name: Green in Snow Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Broccoli head, cut into florets
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the sauce by combining sherry, soy sauce, ginger, and chicken broth.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet.
3. Stir fry the vegetables (cauliflower and broccoli) for 3 to 4 minutes.
4. Add the sauce mixture and toasted sesame seeds; stir well.
5. Cover and steam/cook another 3 to 4 minutes, just until tender crisp.
6. Uncover and drizzle with sesame oil.
7. Stir in the cornstarch mixture and cook for about one minute more, or until the sauce thickens.
8. Serve immediately.
